free_text: Measurements of activation cross sections of (n,p)
and (n,alpha) reactions in the energy range of
3.5-5.9 MeV using a deuterium gas target
Nagoya University, accelerating voltage is 1 -13.5 MV
The gas cell is filled with D2 at 1.6E+5 Pa and
is separated from the vacuum of the accelerator by a
2.2-micrometer thick Havar foil, which acts as
80% lay in the high-energy region, 20% in low-energy
region. For energy determination Al/In method is used.
